ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "external_id" TEXT /* External ID of the product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., Consumable, Non-Consumable) */,
  "internal_reference" TEXT /* Internal reference of the product */,
  "barcode" TEXT /* Barcode associated with the product */,
  "sales_price" REAL /* Sales price of the product */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer the product belongs to */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., Active, Inactive, Out of Stock) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) for inventory management */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "is_variational" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product has variations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_descriptions" (
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product description */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the description belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., frequency, impedance) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the description */,
  "long_description" TEXT /* Detailed, long-form description of the product */,
  "short_description" TEXT /* Brief, concise description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the description was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the description was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_descriptions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the inventory belongs to */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "low_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Low stock threshold for the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date and time of the last stock check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Amount of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale after discount */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manufacturer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manufacturer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the warehouse was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the warehouse was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the variation belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., color, size) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image is the primary image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
